item.title: 曝苹果「天价扫货」DRAM，阻止竞争对手获取
item.guid: 曝苹果「天价扫货」DRAM，阻止竞争对手获取
item.description:
According to a revelation published by source "Jukan", Apple, at an extremely high premium, has virtually "swept up all available mobile DRAM in the market", even willing to bear the cost of damaged operating profit margins. 据消息源「Jukan」发布的爆料，苹果以极高的溢价，在市场上几乎「扫光了市场上所有可取得的移动 DRAM」，甚至愿意为此承受营业利润率受损的代价。

The source emphasized that Apple's move is not merely to meet its own regular stocking needs, but rather aims to artificially inflate DRAM market prices to prevent other smartphone manufacturers from acquiring sufficient memory chips. 该消息人士强调，苹果此举并非单纯为了满足自身的常规备货需求，而是旨在通过人为抬高 DRAM 市场价格，阻止其他智能手机厂商获取足够的内存芯片。

Analyst Ming-Chi Kuo previously released a research report pointing out that Apple is leveraging its supply chain influence to strongly lock in production capacity during the storage chip price increase cycle, and plans to absorb cost pressures in exchange for a larger market share. 而分析师郭明錤此前曾发布研报指出，苹果正凭借其供应链话语权在存储芯片涨价周期中强力锁定产能，并计划通过吸收成本压力以换取更大的市场份额。

Although rising memory costs will inevitably squeeze iPhone's gross profit margin, Ming-Chi Kuo pointed out that Apple's core strategy is to use market turbulence to lock in chips, absorb costs, and seize market share, subsequently replenishing profits through the growth of its services business. 尽管内存成本攀升将不可避免地挤压 iPhone 的毛利率，但郭明錤指出，苹果的核心策略是利用市场动荡期锁定芯片、吸收成本并抢占份额，后续再通过服务业务的增长进行利润回补。

In addition, for marketing purposes, Apple currently plans to maintain the starting price of the iPhone 18 series, to be released in the second half of 2026, as much as possible. 此外，为利于市场营销，苹果目前计划在 2026 年下半年发布的 iPhone 18 系列上尽量维持起售价不变。

item.title: 小米手机官宣涨价，卢伟冰：内存涨价远超预期
item.guid: 小米手机官宣涨价，卢伟冰：内存涨价远超预期
item.description:
Xiaomi Mobile officially announced yesterday that, affected by the continuous sharp rise in prices of global storage chips and other key components, it will adjust the suggested retail prices of some of its in-sale products starting from April 11. 小米手机昨日正式宣布，受全球存储芯片等关键零部件价格持续大幅上涨影响，将于 4 月 11 日起调整部分在售产品的建议零售价。

This price adjustment involves 3 REDMI models: the suggested retail price of the REDMI K90 Pro Max will be increased by 200 yuan; the REDMI Turbo 5 will cancel its Spring Festival special offer, with the 512 GB large memory version continuing to retain a 200 yuan subsidy; the REDMI Turbo 5 Max will also cancel its Spring Festival special offer, with the 512 GB version similarly maintaining a 200 yuan subsidy. 此次调价涉及 3 款 REDMI 机型：REDMI K90 Pro Max 建议零售价上调 200 元；REDMI Turbo 5 取消新春特惠，512 GB 大内存版本继续保留 200 元补贴；REDMI Turbo 5 Max 同步取消新春特惠，512 GB 版本同样维持 200 元补贴。

In response, Lu Weibing, Partner and President of Xiaomi Group, posted on Weibo, stating, "The magnitude of this round of memory price increases has indeed far exceeded expectations, with the price of the same version of memory soaring nearly 4 times compared to Q1 last year... We have had to make slight increases or restore original prices for some models, and we hope for your understanding." 对此，小米集团合伙人、总裁卢伟冰在微博发文回应称，「本轮内存涨价的力度确实远超预期，同版本内存价格相比去年 Q1 飙升近 4 倍……我们不得不对部分机型的零售价格做出小幅上涨或者恢复原价，还望大家理解。」

Wei Siqi, General Manager of Xiaomi China Marketing Department, also stated that the company had previously made every effort to curb the impact of memory price increases on terminal prices, but the speed and magnitude of this round of price increases both exceeded expectations. To ensure normal product supply and stable quality, it was ultimately decided to adjust prices for some products. 小米中国区市场部总经理魏思琪亦表示，公司此前一直全力抑制内存涨价对终端售价的影响，但本轮涨价的速度和幅度均超出预期，为保障产品正常供应与品质稳定，最终决定对部分产品进行调价。

According to Caijing magazine, Xiaomi internally expects mobile phone sales to decline by 13% this year and is adjusting its offline store strategy, shifting its revenue focus to the home appliance business while halting the expansion of offline stores. 另据《财经》杂志报道，小米内部预计今年手机业务销量将下滑 13%，正着手调整线下门店策略，将营收重心转向大家电业务，同时停止线下门店扩张。

item.title: 充电宝迎史上最严国标，明年强制实施
item.guid: 充电宝迎史上最严国标，明年强制实施
item.description:
According to CCTV News, the mandatory national standard GB 47372-2026 "Safety Technical Specification for Mobile Power Supplies," organized and formulated by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, was officially released yesterday (April 3) and will be formally implemented starting April 1 next year. 据央视新闻报道，由工业和信息化部组织制定的强制性国家标准 GB 47372-2026《移动电源安全技术规范》已于昨天（4 月 3 日）正式发布，将于明年 4 月 1 日起正式实施。

The new national standard covers two types of products: "power banks" and "outdoor power stations." 新国标覆盖「充电宝」和「户外电源」两类产品。

In terms of safety, the standard introduces a needle penetration test, explicitly enhancing the safety protection capabilities of mobile power supplies in extreme scenarios such as high temperatures, overcharging, and extrusion; it also adds cyclic aging detection to reduce the risk of internal short circuits after long-term use, and requires products to indicate a recommended safe service life, reminding consumers to replace aged products promptly. 安全性方面，标准引入针刺试验，明确提升移动电源在高温、过度充电、挤压等极端场景下的安全防护能力；同时新增循环老化检测，以降低长期使用后的内部短路风险，并要求产品标明建议安全使用年限，提醒消费者及时更换老化产品。

Furthermore, the new national standard promotes unique product coding management, allowing consumers to query core information such as battery brand via the code; in terms of manufacturing processes, it clearly proposes raw material and production process control requirements, enhancing safety levels from the source. 此外，新国标推行产品唯一性编码管理，消费者可通过编码查询电池品牌等核心信息；在生产制造流程方面，明确提出原材料及生产过程管控要求，从源头提升安全水平。

Experts state that after the implementation of the new national standard, power banks previously purchased and certified under the old 3C standard can still be carried on board normally, provided they comply with current civil aviation regulations. 专家表示，新国标实施后，此前已购买并通过旧 3C 认证的充电宝，只要符合民航现行相关规定，仍可正常携带乘机。

The main drafting units for this new national standard boast a large lineup, encompassing over 30 enterprises and academic institutions, including the China Electronics Standardization Institute, Contemporary Amperex Technology (CATL), Huawei Terminal, Sunwoda, Anker Innovations, Xiaomi, OPPO Guangdong Mobile Communications, BYD Lithium Battery, Lenovo, and Bull Group. 本次新国标的主要起草单位阵容庞大，涵盖中国电子技术标准化研究院、宁德新能源科技、华为终端、欣旺达、安克创新、小米、OPPO 广东移动通信、比亚迪锂电池、联想、公牛集团等逾 30 家企业与学术机构。

item.title: 福特刷新纽北美系纪录，小米排名下滑、雷军发文祝贺
item.guid: 福特刷新纽北美系纪录，小米排名下滑、雷军发文祝贺
item.description:
On April 3, Ford China announced that the Ford GT Mk IV set a new lap record at the Nürburgring Nordschleife, with a time of 6:15.977, establishing the fastest Nürburgring lap time for an American manufacturer. 4 月 3 日，福特中国宣布福特 GT Mk IV 在纽北赛道刷新圈速纪录，成绩为 6:15.977，创下美系厂商纽北最快圈速。

In response, Xiaomi CEO Lei Jun immediately reposted it on Weibo with the comment "Congratulations, Ford," and included a thumbs-up emoji. Lei Jun added in the comments that the Xiaomi SU7 Ultra is currently ranked 4th globally on the official Nürburgring lap time list, stating it's "nothing to be ashamed of." 对此，小米 CEO 雷军随即在微博上转发并留言「祝贺福特」，还附上点赞表情。雷军在评论中补充称，小米 SU7 Ultra 目前位列纽北官方圈速榜全球第 4，「也不丢人」。

Previously, the Xiaomi SU7 Ultra had garnered widespread attention for its Nürburgring lap time. After the Ford GT Mk IV broke the record this time, Xiaomi's ranking on that list consequently dropped by one position. 此前，小米 SU7 Ultra 曾凭借纽北圈速成绩引发广泛关注。此番福特 GT Mk IV 刷新纪录后，小米在该榜单上的排名相应下降一位。

item.title: Slack 切断大中华区服务，执行方式引发用户强烈反弹
item.guid: Slack-切断大中华区服务，执行方式引发用户强烈反弹
item.description:
According to The Information, Slack recently officially deactivated all Workspaces with billing addresses in mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau, affecting both paid and free users. 据 The Information 报道，Slack 于近日正式停用了账单地址位于中国大陆、中国香港及中国澳门地区的所有 Workspace，付费用户与免费用户均受影响。

After deactivation, users cannot access historical messages, files, channels, or workflows, and Slack has simultaneously initiated a 90-day data deletion countdown. Upon verification, iFanr's own Slack Workspace has also been deactivated. 停用后，用户无法访问历史消息、文件、频道及工作流，Slack 同时启动了 90 天数据删除倒计时。 经核查，爱范儿自己的 Slack Workspace 也已被停用。

Last November, The Information first reported that Slack had sent notifications to users in affected regions, requiring them to migrate their accounts to Alibaba Cloud before February of this year, otherwise their subscriptions would not be renewed. 去年 11 月，The Information 率先报道 Slack 已向受影响地区用户发送通知，要求其在今年 2 月前将账户迁移至阿里云，否则订阅将不予续期。

However, the actual implementation method sparked strong dissatisfaction among many users. Several Hong Kong users on Reddit reported that they had never received any prior notification, or that notification emails were moved to their spam folders by the system. 然而，实际执行方式引发了大量用户的强烈不满。Reddit 上多名中国香港用户反映，他们从未收到任何事先通知，或通知邮件被系统归入垃圾邮件文件夹。

A user wrote: "We are completely locked out and unable to access any files, customer communication records, or historical data. Slack's handling feels like blackmail – they cut off our access without giving us any time window to export data." 一名用户写道：「我们完全被锁在外面，无法访问任何文件、客户沟通记录和历史数据。Slack 的处理方式感觉就像是勒索——他们切断了我们的访问，却不给我们任何导出数据的时间窗口。」

Slack Support provided a standardized template response, confirming that "the Workspace has been affected by previously announced service changes," but did not provide specific data export procedures or timelines. Slack Support 对此给出的是统一模板回复，确认「Workspace 已受到此前已告知的服务变更影响」，但未提供具体的数据导出流程或时间表。

The notification itself also showed clear differential treatment: larger paying customers received Alibaba Cloud migration guidelines, while smaller teams directly received service termination notices without being offered migration options. 通知本身也存在明显的差异化处理：较大的付费客户收到了阿里云迁移指引，而规模较小的团队则直接收到服务终止通知，未获提供迁移选项。

item.title: 工信部预警：iOS 13 至 17.2.1 存在严重漏洞，建议尽快升级
item.guid: 工信部预警：iOS-13-至-17.2.1-存在严重漏洞，建议尽快升级
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology's National Vulnerability Database (NVDB) recently monitored and found that attackers are using exploit tools targeting Apple devices to carry out cyberattack activities, which can lead to serious harm such as information theft and system control. The affected range covers Apple devices such as iPhones and iPads running iOS versions 13.0 to 17.2.1. 据界面新闻报道，工信部网络安全威胁和漏洞信息共享平台（NVDB）近日监测发现，有攻击者正在利用针对苹果终端产品的漏洞利用工具实施网络攻击活动，可导致信息窃取、系统受控等严重危害。受影响范围涵盖运行 iOS 13.0 至 17.2.1 版本的 iPhone、iPad 等苹果终端产品。

The Ministry of Industry and Information Technology recommends that relevant users complete risk assessment as soon as possible, fix vulnerabilities by upgrading system versions or installing patches, and refer to Apple's official security update announcements. 工信部建议相关用户尽快完成风险排查，通过升级系统版本或安装补丁的方式修复漏洞，并参考苹果官方安全更新公告。

item.title: Vibe Coding 应用 Anything 被苹果下架后重新上架
item.guid: Vibe-Coding-应用-Anything-被苹果下架后重新上架
item.description:
The official account for Vibe Coding App "Anything" just posted a confirmation that Apple has relisted the previously removed Vibe Coding tool, Anything, on the App Store. To celebrate its relisting, Anything announced a $5,000 weekend hackathon event, along with 20,000 Credits. Vibe Coding App「Anything」官方账号刚刚发文确认，苹果已将此前下架的 Vibe Coding 工具 Anything 重新上架 App Store。为庆祝此次重新上架，Anything 宣布发起一场 5000 美元的周末黑客马拉松活动，并附赠 2 万 Credits。

Previously, Apple completely removed Anything from the App Store, citing a violation of App Store Review Guideline 2.5.2. 此前，苹果以违反 App Store 审核指南第 2.5.2 条款为由，将 Anything 彻底下架。

This clause stipulates that apps must be self-contained within their bundles and must not download, install, or execute code that introduces or changes the app's features or functionality. Anything, which allows users to describe requirements in natural language on an iPhone, have AI generate code in real-time, and run it on the device, directly conflicts with this clause. 该条款规定，App 应自包含在自己的套装中，不得下载、安装或执行会引入或更改 App 特性或功能的代码。Anything 支持用户在 iPhone 上通过自然语言描述需求、由 AI 实时生成代码并在设备上运行，与该条款直接冲突。

Regarding this removal, Anything's official account previously posted a rebuttal on the X platform: "Breaking: Apple is panicking about Vibe Coding and has removed Anything from the App Store, so we're moving app development to iMessage. Good luck to Apple trying to remove this one." 对于此次下架，Anything 官方曾在 X 平台发文反击：「重磅：苹果对 Vibe Coding 感到恐慌，把 Anything 从 App Store 下架了，所以我们把应用开发转移到了 iMessage。祝苹果顺利移除这个。」

It's worth noting that Apple itself is not opposed to AI-assisted programming – Xcode 26.3, released in February this year, has integrated Claude Agent and OpenAI Codex. 值得注意的是，苹果本身并不反对 AI 辅助编程——今年 2 月推出的 Xcode 26.3 已将 Claude Agent 与 OpenAI Codex 集成其中。

What Apple truly resists is users generating and executing new code through third-party apps outside of store review; this controversy is essentially a battle for platform control. 苹果真正抵制的，是用户通过第三方 App 在商店审核之外生成并执行新代码，这场风波本质上是一场平台控制权之争。

🔗 Related reading: Apple, the Strictest Father of Vibe Coding 🔗 相关阅读： 苹果，Vibe Coding 最严厉的父亲

item.title: 阿里千问 3.6 登顶国产 AI 编程榜
item.guid: 阿里千问-3.6-登顶国产-AI-编程榜
item.description:
On April 2nd, Alibaba released its new generation large language model, Qwen 3.6-Plus. The day after its release, the model ranked second globally with 1452 points in the React specific category of the Code Arena list under LMArena, a globally renowned large model blind testing platform, becoming the highest-ranked domestic large model on that list. 4 月 2 日，阿里巴巴发布新一代大语言模型 Qwen 3.6-Plus，发布次日，该模型即在全球知名大模型盲测平台 LMArena 旗下的 Code Arena 榜单 React 专项中以 1452 分位列全球第二，成为该榜单排名最高的国产大模型。

The list data shows that Qwen 3.6-Plus ranked second with 1452 points, trailing only Anthropic's Claude-Opus-4.6-Thinking (1540 points), leading GPT-5.0-High (1448 points) by 4 points, and surpassing Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview (1440 points) by 12 points. 榜单数据显示，Qwen 3.6-Plus 以 1452 分位列第二，仅次于 Anthropic 旗下的 Claude-Opus-4.6-Thinking（1540 分），以 4 分优势领先 GPT-5.0-High（1448 分），并以 12 分差距超越 Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview（1440 分）。

In the Code Arena overall list, which comprehensively evaluates AI programming capabilities, Qwen 3.6-Plus also ranked first among domestic models. With these achievements, Alibaba rose to fourth place in the global AI lab rankings, trailing only Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google. 在综合评估 AI 编程能力的 Code Arena 全榜中，Qwen 3.6-Plus 同样位居国产模型首位。凭借上述成绩，阿里在全球 AI 实验室排名中升至第四，仅次于 Anthropic、OpenAI 和 Google。

LMArena employs real-user blind testing and a real-time adversarial ranking mechanism, and is considered a highly credible performance evaluation platform in the AI field. LMArena 采用真实用户盲测、实时对抗排名机制，被视为 AI 领域较具公信力的性能评测平台。

item.title: 曝 R 星母公司解散 AI 团队，七年研发成果戛然而止
item.guid: 曝-R-星母公司解散-AI-团队，七年研发成果戛然而止
item.description:
According to Insider Gaming, Take-Two Interactive, the parent company of GTA 6 developer Rockstar, made significant adjustments to its AI division yesterday, laying off an unspecified number of employees, including the head of AI. 据 Insider Gaming 报道，GTA 6 开发商 Rockstar 的母公司 Take-Two Interactive 昨天对旗下 AI 部门进行了重大调整，裁撤了包括 AI 负责人在内的不明数量员工。

Luke Dicken, former head of AI at Take-Two, confirmed the news in a LinkedIn post: "Sadly, I have to tell you all that my team and I have lost our jobs at T2." Take-Two 前 AI 负责人 Luke Dicken 在 LinkedIn 上发文证实了这一消息：「很遗憾，我不得不告诉大家，我和我的团队在 T2 的工作丢了。」

He stated that he would publish a more detailed retrospective article in a week and called on industry professionals to help team members find new jobs, describing them as people who "spent 7 years developing cutting-edge technology, excelling at combining innovation with product design to create systems that empower the entire development process." 他表示将在一周后发布更详细的回顾文章，并呼吁业界人士帮助团队成员寻找新工作，称这些人「用 7 年时间开发了前沿技术，擅长将创新与产品设计结合，打造出能赋能整个开发流程的系统」。

Currently, Take-Two has not publicly stated the specific scale and reasons for the layoffs, but outsiders generally interpret this as a signal of contraction in the gaming industry's investment in AI R&D. It is worth noting that Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick previously publicly stated that AI "will never" be able to create games like GTA 6, and has long endorsed the manual development model. 目前 Take-Two 尚未公开说明此次裁员的具体规模和原因，但外界普遍将此解读为游戏行业在 AI 研发投入上有所收缩的信号。值得注意的是，Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick 此前曾公开表态，AI「永远」无法制作出 GTA 6 这样的游戏，并长期为人工开发模式背书。

This is not Take-Two's first large-scale layoff in recent years. In 2024, the company cut about 5% of its employees and canceled multiple projects under development to improve financial efficiency. This adjustment to the AI department comes just months before the release of GTA 6, a rather sensitive timing. 这并非 Take-Two 近年来首次大规模裁员。2024 年，该公司曾裁减约 5% 的员工，并取消多个开发中的项目，以提升财务效率。此次 AI 部门的调整发生在 GTA 6 发售前数月，时间节点颇为敏感。

item.title: 荣耀 x 京东达成全方位战略合作，三年目标超千亿
item.guid: 荣耀-x-京东达成全方位战略合作，三年目标超千亿
item.description:
Recently, Honor and JD.com signed a strategic cooperation agreement, establishing a comprehensive strategic partnership. According to the agreement, both parties will engage in in-depth cooperation across three core areas: product co-creation, user co-operation, and ecosystem sharing, setting a three-year cumulative cooperation target of over 100 billion yuan across all domains. 日前，荣耀与京东签订战略合作协议，建立全方位战略合作伙伴关系。根据协议，双方将围绕产品共创、用户共营、生态共享三大核心领域展开深度合作，并设定三年累计规模超 1000 亿元的全领域合作目标。

At the product co-creation level, both parties will cover the full lifecycle of multi-category products including mobile phones, all-scenario devices, AIoT, and robots. Cooperation content includes strategic new product launches, joint IP and C2M customization projects, and scenario-based product co-creation for specific groups such as food delivery riders, couriers, and gamers. 产品共创层面，双方将覆盖手机、全场景、AIoT 及机器人等多品类产品的全生命周期。合作内容包括战略新品首发、联合 IP 与 C2M 定制项目，以及针对外卖骑手、快递员、游戏玩家等特定人群的场景化产品共创。

At the user co-operation level, both parties will integrate full-link marketing resources, enhance user experience through joint membership operations and precise audience reach, and engage in in-depth cooperation in scenarios such as e-sports and sports health. 用户共营层面，双方将整合全链路营销资源，通过联合会员运营与精准人群触达提升用户体验，并在电竞、运动健康等场景展开深度合作。

At the ecosystem sharing level, both parties will leverage Honor's on-device large model capabilities and JD.com's JoyAI large model, JoyInside, and other AI ecosystems to jointly create innovative experiences in scenarios such as product guidance, life services, and financial management. 生态共享层面，双方将基于荣耀端侧大模型能力与京东 JoyAI 大模型、JoyInside 等 AI 生态，共同打造商品导购、生活服务、金融理财等场景的创新体验。

In the robotics field, JD.com's offline stores will pilot the deployment of Honor robots for traffic guidance and shopping assistance. Furthermore, both parties will rely on Honor's terminal products and JD.com's Joybuy platform to jointly expand into overseas markets, and further deepen cooperation in areas such as omnichannel O2O, instant retail, and technology finance and insurance. 在机器人领域，京东线下门店将试点部署荣耀机器人用于引流导购。此外，双方还将依托荣耀终端产品与京东 Joybuy 平台协同拓展海外市场，并在全渠道 O2O、即时零售、科技金融保险等领域进一步深化合作。

item.title: 上海交大 x 蚂蚁健康共建医疗 AI 联合实验室
item.guid: 上海交大-x-蚂蚁健康共建医疗-AI-联合实验室
item.description:
Shanghai Jiao Tong University's School of Artificial Intelligence and Ant Health recently signed a cooperation agreement in Shanghai. Both parties will jointly establish the 'AI4HealthCare Joint Laboratory' to collaboratively tackle the research and development of specialized intelligent agents for the medical field and their clinical adaptation and application. 上海交通大学人工智能学院与蚂蚁健康近日在上海签署合作协议，双方将共同发起成立「AI4HealthCare 联合实验室」，围绕医疗领域专科智能体的研发与临床适配应用展开联合攻坚。

The joint laboratory will leverage Shanghai Jiao Tong University's leading advantages in basic research, algorithmic models, and academic innovation, combined with Ant Health's accumulated scenario resources, technical capabilities, and industry resources in the healthcare field, to jointly explore innovative application models of AI in disease prevention, health management, and auxiliary diagnosis. 联合实验室将依托上海交大在基础研究、算法模型与学术创新方面的领先优势，结合蚂蚁健康在医疗健康领域积累的场景资源、技术能力与产业资源，共同探索 AI 在疾病预防、健康管理、辅助诊疗等环节的创新应用模式。

Both parties will also link AI disciplines with clinical specialties of various affiliated hospitals, focusing on promoting key technology research and development for medical specialized intelligent agents and clinical applications. Relevant achievements will first be implemented in the Ant Afu App. 双方还将联动人工智能学科与各附属医院临床专科，重点推进医疗专科智能体与临床应用的关键技术研发。相关成果将率先落地于蚂蚁阿福 App。

item.title: 💡 麦肯锡高级合伙人：AI 正在「压扁」你的公司，管理层级将大幅削减
item.guid: 💡-麦肯锡高级合伙人：AI-正在「压扁」你的公司，管理层级将大幅削减
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Alexis Krivkovich, a senior partner at McKinsey, recently stated on 'The McKinsey Podcast' that AI is empowering business leaders with 'superhuman management capabilities,' enabling them to oversee larger teams and thus driving corporate organizational structures towards flattening. 据《商业内幕》报道，麦肯锡高级合伙人 Alexis Krivkovich 近日在《The McKinsey Podcast》中表示，AI 正在赋予企业领导者「超人般的管理能力」，使其得以统筹更大规模的团队，从而推动企业组织架构走向扁平化。

Krivkovich pointed out that over the past decade, companies have, on average, added at least one to three management layers between the CEO and frontline employees. This not only incurs high labor costs but also slows down decision-making efficiency – each layer means an additional 'sign-off' hurdle. Krivkovich 指出，过去十年间，企业在 CEO 与一线员工之间平均新增了至少一至三个管理层级。这不仅带来高昂的人力成本，更拖慢了决策效率——每一个层级，都意味着多一道需要「签字放行」的关卡。

The intervention of AI Agents is replacing these intermediate nodes, directly assuming the functions of decision support and information transmission. 而 AI Agent 的介入，正在替代这些中间节点，直接承担决策辅助与信息传递的职能。

Eno Reyes, co-founder and CTO of AI-native software development platform Factory, told Business Insider in March this year: 'Your organizational chart is likely to start compressing horizontally, becoming flatter.' AI 原生软件开发平台 Factory 的联合创始人兼 CTO Eno Reyes 今年 3 月对《商业内幕》表示：「你的组织架构图很可能会开始横向压缩，变得更加扁平。」

Factory has currently deployed autonomous programming agents for consulting firms like KPMG and tech companies like Nvidia and Adobe. Factory 目前已为毕马威等咨询公司及英伟达、Adobe 等科技企业部署自主编程智能体。

IBM is also advancing similar deployments. Mohamed Ali, the company's senior vice president, revealed that IBM plans to deploy 'digital employees' in collaboration with its 150,000 human consultants, predicting that the future way of managing AI will be distinctly different from managing human employees. IBM 方面同样在推进类似布局。该公司高级副总裁 Mohamed Ali 透露，IBM 计划将「数字员工」与旗下 15 万名人类顾问协同部署，并预判未来管理 AI 的方式将与管理人类员工截然不同。

There will be dedicated systems to manage these things, and dedicated systems to set guardrails.

item.title: 39 元/月起，小米 MiMo 推出订阅制 Token 套餐
item.guid: 39-元/月起，小米-MiMo-推出订阅制-Token-套餐
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi officially released the Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan, launching subscription-based Token package services for global developers and AI users. The packages are divided into four tiers: 昨天，小米正式发布了 Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan，面向全球开发者和 AI 用户推出订阅制 Token 套餐服务。套餐共分四档：

    Lite package: 39 yuan/month, providing 60 million Credits, capable of executing approximately 120 medium to complex tasks;

    Standard package: 99 yuan/month, providing 200 million Credits, capable of executing approximately 400 tasks;

    Pro package: 329 yuan/month, providing 700 million Credits, capable of executing approximately 1400 tasks;

    The Max plan costs 659 yuan/month, offering 1.6 billion Credits, capable of executing approximately 3200 tasks, positioned for all-day high-intensity usage scenarios.

In terms of tool compatibility, MiMo Token Plan has been adapted for mainstream AI programming tools and development platforms such as Claude Code, Cline, Kilo Code, OpenCode, Hermes Agent, and CodeBuddy Code. Xiaomi stated that automatic renewal and more flexible usage management features are currently under development. 在工具兼容性方面，MiMo Token Plan 已针对 Claude Code、Cline、Kilo Code、OpenCode、Hermes Agent、CodeBuddy Code 等主流 AI 编程工具和开发平台完成适配。小米表示，自动续费及更灵活的用量管理功能正在开发中。

item.title: 三大外卖平台被约谈，6 月 1 日前落实食品安全新规
item.guid: 三大外卖平台被约谈，6-月-1-日前落实食品安全新规
item.description:
According to CCTV News, the State Administration for Market Regulation recently held an administrative guidance meeting for food delivery platform enterprises in Beijing, requiring Meituan, Taobao Flash Sale, and JD.com to promptly conduct self-inspection and rectification, and strictly implement the upcoming "Regulations on the Supervision and Management of Food Safety Main Responsibilities of Online Catering Service Operators." 据央视新闻报道，市场监管总局近日在北京召开外卖平台企业行政指导会，要求美团、淘宝闪购、京东 3 家平台企业尽快开展自查整改，严格落实即将实施的《网络餐饮服务经营者落实食品安全主体责任监督管理规定》。

The meeting required all platforms to align with the "Regulations" item by item, fully fulfilling their main platform responsibilities from five dimensions: qualification review, management assurance, public disclosure, emergency management, and collaborative supervision. 会议要求各平台逐条对标《规定》，从资质审查、管理保障、社会公开、应急管理、协同监管 5 个维度全面履行平台主体责任。

At the same time, with June 1st, the official implementation date of the "Regulations," as the deadline, a reverse timeline should be established to comprehensively review existing systems, processes, staffing, and technical support. 同时，以《规定》正式实施的 6 月 1 日为节点，倒排工期，全面梳理现有制度、流程、人员配备及技术保障等环节。

The regulatory authorities also emphasized that the three major platforms must strictly control review, management, and delivery, enhance management capabilities through technical means, actively integrate into the government's regulatory system, and shift from "passive response" to "proactive engagement." 监管层还强调，三大平台须严把审查关、管理关、配送关，借助技术手段强化管理能力，主动融入政府监管体系，从「被动应付」转向「主动对接」。

Specific measures include promoting the implementation of "Internet + Transparent Kitchen" and encouraging food delivery riders to participate in food safety supervision, jointly building a social co-governance framework for food safety. 具体措施包括推动「互联网 + 明厨亮灶」落地，以及鼓励外卖骑手参与食品安全监督，共建食品安全社会共治格局。

item.title: 滴滴开放打车 Skill，支持「龙虾」打车
item.guid: 滴滴开放打车-Skill，支持「龙虾」打车
item.description:
Didi Chuxing announced yesterday the official opening of its ride-hailing Skill "didi-ride-skill," providing complete access to travel service capabilities for "Longxia" (OpenClaw) users. 滴滴出行昨日宣布，正式开放旗下打车 Skill「didi-ride-skill」，面向「龙虾」(OpenClaw) 用户提供完整的出行服务能力接入。

The didi-ride-skill packages and opens Didi's underlying travel capabilities accumulated over many years, covering functions such as address parsing, price estimation, route planning, driver matching, order tracking, and nearby search. didi-ride-skill 将滴滴多年积累的底层出行能力打包开放，涵盖地址解析、价格预估、路线规划、司机匹配、订单追踪与周边搜索等功能。

After installation, users can directly initiate ride-hailing requests in natural language within the Longxia chat box, without switching to a separate app. The Skill handles address confirmation, vehicle selection, order placement, and order status lookup throughout the process. 安装后，可直接在龙虾对话框中以自然语言发起打车需求，无需切换至独立 App，全程由 Skill 完成地址确认、车型选择、下单及订单状态回查等操作。

The didi-ride-skill also supports memorizing user preferences, such as "take an express ride to work, a discounted ride home" or binding "home" as a fixed address, to respond faster to subsequent requests. didi-ride-skill 还支持记忆用户偏好，例如「上班打快车，下班打特惠」或将「回家」绑定为固定地址，以便在后续请求中更快响应。

Didi also disclosed AI ride-hailing usage data: in the past week, the number of users using Didi AI ride-hailing increased 37 times compared to the beginning of the year, with users born after 2000 accounting for over 40%, making them the main user group for current AI travel functions. 滴滴同步披露了 AI 叫车的使用数据：最近一周，使用滴滴 AI 打车的用户数量相比年初增加了 37 倍，其中 00 后用户占比超过 40%，是当前 AI 出行功能的主力用户群体。

💻 GitHub: github.com/didi/didi-ride-skill 💻 GitHub: github.com/didi/didi-ride-skill

item.title: 告别「抽卡」，阿里发布 Wan2.7-Video，可一句话修改视频
item.guid: 告别「抽卡」，阿里发布-Wan2.7-Video，可一句话修改视频
item.description:
On April 3rd, Alibaba's Tongyi Lab officially announced the release of the Wan2.7-Video series of video generation models, covering four professional sub-models: text-to-video (Wan2.7-t2v), image-to-video (Wan2.7-i2v), reference-to-video (Wan2.7-r2v), and video editing (Wan2.7-videoedit). 4 月 3 日，阿里通义实验室官宣发布 Wan2.7-Video 视频生成系列模型，涵盖文生视频（Wan2.7-t2v）、图生视频（Wan2.7-i2v）、参考生视频（Wan2.7-r2v）和视频编辑（Wan2.7-videoedit）四个专业子模型。

    Video Editing : Supports local or global modification of footage through natural language instructions, covering operations such as adding/deleting elements, replacing objects, modifying attributes, switching scene seasons, and visual styles (e.g., realistic to watercolor, live-action to claymation);

    Plot and Filming Adjustments : Without changing the original identity and scene, it supports modifying character dialogue (automatically matching lip-sync and timbre), actions, as well as camera position, perspective, shot type, focal length, and other shooting parameters;

    Creative Replication : Supports reference transfer across dimensions such as action sequences, camera movement, visual style, and particle effects, allowing up to 5 video subject references to be specified simultaneously;

    Plot Continuation : Introduces a combined mechanism of video continuation and end-frame control, allowing dynamic continuity to be maintained while specifying the ending frame, resolving the common "braking sensation" in traditional start-and-end frame solutions;

    Character Control : Supports multi-modal reference to lock character appearance and timbre, supports over 40 detailed expressions, and improves both sound realism and audio-visual synchronization quality. Related audio capabilities are technically supported by the Tongyi Lab's speech team;

    Cinematography Capabilities : Supports dozens of basic camera movements and complex cinematography solutions such as Hitchcockian zoom, 360-degree orbit, FPV drone dive, and one-shot takes.

item.title: 蚂蚁数科发布专业 AI 智能体 DTClaw
item.guid: 蚂蚁数科发布专业-AI-智能体-DTClaw
item.description:
Ant Digital yesterday officially announced that its professional AI intelligent agent product DTClaw has entered the internal testing phase. This product is positioned as a "professional assistant," targeting professionals such as financial experts, marketing experts, and data experts, providing 7x24 hour online exclusive AI intelligent agent services. 蚂蚁数科昨天正式宣布，旗下专业 AI 智能体产品 DTClaw 开启内测阶段，这款产品的定位是「专业虾」，面向金融专家、营销专家、数据专家等专业人群，提供 7 × 24 小时在线的专属 AI 智能体服务。

According to reports, DTClaw's main feature is "born an expert," with hundreds of built-in professional skills covering high-value scenarios such as wealth management, investment, data analysis, R&D, and testing. It also deeply integrates with enterprise office, financial, sales, and marketing systems, supporting workflow automation. 据介绍，DTClaw 主打「出生即专家」，内置上百种专业 skills 技能，覆盖理财、投资、数据分析、研发与测试等高价值场景，并深度集成企业办公、财务、销售、营销系统，支持工作流程自动化。

The official statement claims that users can get started with one-click deployment, without needing to configure from scratch, saving 50% of token consumption. 官方称，用户一键部署即可上手，无需从零配置，可节省 50% 的 Token 消耗量。

In terms of security, DTClaw has innovatively created the CARLI security model, establishing safety barriers for intelligent agent operations by equipping AI with "brake" and "black box" mechanisms. 安全方面，DTClaw 独创了 CARLI 安全模型，通过为 AI 配备「刹车」和「黑匣子」机制，为智能体运行建立安全护栏。

item.title: Manner 咖啡涨价
item.guid: Manner-咖啡涨价
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Manner Coffee recently issued a price adjustment announcement on its official ordering mini-program, announcing that starting April 7, the price of single-origin SOE coffee at its stores will increase by 5 yuan per cup, and the price of the popular store product "The Wizard of Oz" will also increase by 5 yuan. 据界面新闻报道，Manner Coffee 近期在其官方点单小程序发布价格调整公告，宣布将于 4 月 7 日起对门店单品豆 SOE 咖啡每杯上调 5 元、门店热门产品「绿野仙踪」售价同步上涨 5 元。

Manner Coffee stated that the synchronized price increase across all stores nationwide is primarily due to the selection of higher-quality coffee beans to provide consumers with a better flavor experience. The company also emphasized that its long-standing "bring your own cup and get 5 yuan off" discount policy remains unchanged. Manner Coffee 方面表示，全国门店价格同步上调，核心原因是将选用品质更优的咖啡豆，以为消费者提供更出色的风味体验。公司同时强调，门店长期推行的「自带杯减 5 元」优惠政策保持不变。

item.title: AI 短剧《桃花簪》因 AI 换脸全面下架，播放量曾破 4000 万
item.guid: AI-短剧《桃花簪》因-AI-换脸全面下架，播放量曾破-4000-万
item.description:
Yesterday, ByteDance's Hongguo Short Drama announced the complete removal of the short drama "Peach Blossom Hairpin" and suspended the production company from uploading all series for 15 days. 昨天，字节跳动旗下红果短剧宣布全面下架短剧《桃花簪》，并暂停该出品方上传所有剧集 15 天。

The incident originated on the evening of March 30, when Hanfu makeup blogger "Baicai Hanfu Makeup" publicly accused on social media that the production company of "Peach Blossom Hairpin" unauthorizedly used her personal photos to generate character images through AI technology, and portrayed the character as a negative image of "greedy and lustful." 事件起源于 3 月 30 日晚，汉服妆造博主「白菜汉服妆造」在社交平台公开指控，《桃花簪》出品方未经其授权，擅自使用其个人照片，通过 AI 技术生成角色形象，且将角色塑造为「贪财好色」的负面形象。

According to Phoenix Network Technology, "Peach Blossom Hairpin" is an AI-generated ancient style short drama, with platform views once exceeding 40 million and over 28,000 people having favorited it. 据凤凰网科技报道，《桃花簪》为 AI 生成古风短剧，相关平台播放量曾突破 4000 万，超 2.8 万人收藏。

On April 2, the Actors Committee of the China Association of Radio and Television Social Organizations issued a statement, directly addressing current infringement issues such as AI face-swapping synthesis and voiceprint cloning, demanding that online platforms strictly implement their primary responsibility for content review and establish a long-term mechanism for AI performance content authorization verification. 4 月 2 日，中国广播电视社会组织联合会演员委员会发布声明，直指当前 AI 换脸合成、声纹克隆复刻等侵权乱象，要求网络平台严格落实内容审核主体责任，建立 AI 演艺内容授权核验长效机制。

Hongguo Short Drama stated in its announcement that upon receiving the complaint, the platform immediately initiated a review of the production company's relevant information and materials. After careful comparison and verification, the platform determined that the production company violated relevant content compliance usage regulations, constituting a breach of contract, and thus made the decision to remove the content and suspend uploads. 红果短剧在声明中表示，平台收到投诉后第一时间启动对出品方相关信息与材料的梳理审核。经细致比对核查，平台认定出品方违反相关内容合规使用规定，构成违规违约，遂作出下架及暂停上传的处理决定。

The statement also pointed out that for production companies that violate regulations or breach contracts, the platform will take measures including content removal, termination of cooperation, and relevant legal accountability, depending on the severity of the circumstances. 声明还指出，对于违规违约出品方，平台将视情节采取包括内容下架、停止合作、相关法律追责等措施。

item.title: 乐高携手四大球星推出 Editions 系列，迎战 2026 世界杯
item.guid: 乐高携手四大球星推出-Editions-系列，迎战-2026-世界杯
item.description:
The LEGO Group announced yesterday its collaboration with Cristiano Ronaldo, Kylian Mbappé, Lionel Messi, and Vinicius Júnior to launch the new LEGO® Editions series sets, in anticipation of this year's 2026 FIFA World Cup. 乐高集团昨日宣布与克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多、基利安·姆巴佩、利昂内尔·梅西及维尼修斯·儒尼奥尔达成合作，推出全新乐高® Editions 系列套装，以迎接今年的 2026 FIFA 世界杯。

This release covers three product lines: "Classic Goal Moments," "Football Legends," and "Messi's Celebration Moments": 此次发布共涵盖「经典进球瞬间」「足球传奇」「梅西的庆祝时刻」三类产品线：

    Classic Goal Moments (ages 10+): Four models: Ronaldo (43012), Mbappé (43013), Messi (43011), Vinicius (43027), with 490 ~ 510 pieces each, priced at 279 yuan per model;

    Football Legends (ages 10+): Two displayable minifigure models: Ronaldo (43016) and Messi (43015), each offering two building styles, priced at 699 yuan per model;

    Messi's Celebration Moment (43018, ages 14+): 1427 pieces, can be used as 3D wall decoration, priced at 1599 yuan.

item.title: 《寒战 1994》回归大荧幕，定档五一
item.guid: 《寒战-1994》回归大荧幕，定档五一
item.description:
The crime action film "Cold War 1994," directed by Longman Leung, has officially announced its release date for May Day, along with a synchronized release of its teaser and poster. This marks the return of the "Cold War" series after a decade. 由梁乐民执导的犯罪动作电影《寒战 1994》正式官宣定档五一，并同步发布定档预告及海报。这是《寒战》系列时隔十年的回归之作。

The film brings together the strong return of the original cast of the "Cold War Universe," including Chow Yun-fat, Aaron Kwok, and Tony Leung Ka-fai, with Louis Koo making a special appearance. Daniel Wu, Terrance Lau, Kang Ren Wu, and Tse Kwan-ho lead the cast, supported by Louise Wong, Fish Liew, Aidan Gillen, and Hugh Bonneville. The scale of the cast is arguably the largest for a Hong Kong crime film in recent years. 影片汇集了周润发、郭富城、梁家辉等「寒战宇宙」原班人马强势回归，古天乐特别出演，吴彦祖、刘俊谦、吴慷仁、谢君豪领衔主演，王丹妮、廖子妤、艾丹·吉伦及休·博纳维尔主演，阵容规模堪称近年港产警匪片之最。

In terms of plot, "Cold War 1994" adopts a dual timeline narrative structure, interwoven with "2017" and "1994." In the 2017 storyline, former Deputy Commissioner of Police (Operations) Lee Man-bun (played by Tony Leung Ka-fai) is unexpectedly attacked and goes missing. Commissioner of Police Lau Kit-fai (played by Aaron Kwok) immediately seeks assistance from senior barrister Kan Au-wai (played by Chow Yun-fat), and together they uncover a dusty mysterious file from 1994. 剧情上，《寒战 1994》采用双时间线叙事结构，以「2017 年」与「1994 年」交织推进。2017 年线索中，前警务处行动副处长李文彬（梁家辉 饰）意外遇袭失踪，警务处处长刘杰辉（郭富城 饰）随即向资深大律师简奥伟（周润发 饰）寻求协助，两人共同开启一份尘封的 1994 年神秘档案。

item.title: One Fun Thing｜词元变「辞员」，开源项目让同事「赛博永生」
item.guid: One-Fun-Thing｜词元变「辞员」，开源项目让同事「赛博永生」
item.description:
According to Bianews, netizens recently discovered an open-source project on GitHub called 'colleague-skill,' which can train AI models using employee work data, documents, and chat records. After an employee leaves, an AI 'digital human avatar' can continue to perform some of their work, achieving 'cyber immortality.' 据鞭牛士报道，近日有网友在 GitHub 上发现一个名为「colleague-skill」的开源项目，可将员工的工作数据、文档及聊天记录等信息训练成 AI 模型，在员工离职后，由 AI 「数字人分身」继续承担部分工作，实现「赛博永生」。

Currently, some netizens have reported that their former colleagues have been 'refined' into digital humans by their companies using the aforementioned method. Companies use the chat records and work documents of departing employees to train AI and automatically generate an AI avatar of that employee. 目前已有网友反映，自己的离职同事被公司以上述方式「炼化」成数字人。公司将离职员工的聊天记录与工作文档用于训练 AI 并自动生成该员工的 AI 分身。

This avatar can not only mimic the tone and work habits of the departed employee but also send messages to current employees, complete work handovers, and answer business questions based on documents retained during their tenure. 该分身不仅能模仿离职员工的语气与工作习惯，还可向在职员工发送消息，基于其在职期间留存的文档完成工作交接、回答业务问题。

item.title: 周末看什么｜《我，许可》
item.guid: 周末看什么｜《我，许可》
item.description:
Yesterday marked the official release of 'I, Xu Ke,' directed by Yang Lina, written by You Xiaoying, starring Wen Qi and Qin Hailu, with special appearances by Bai Ke, Li Xueqin, Niu Li, and others. 《我，许可》已于昨天正式上映，由杨荔钠执导，游晓颖编剧，文淇、秦海璐领衔主演，白客、李雪琴、牛莉等联合出演。

The film focuses on Xu Ke (played by Wen Qi), a 'post-00s' girl who is 'single from birth.' She finds herself in a predicament due to an impending gynecological surgery, but her plans are completely disrupted by the surprise visit of her mother, Hu Chunrong (played by Qin Hailu). 影片聚焦「00 后」「母单」女孩许可（文淇 饰），她因一场迫在眉睫的妇科手术而陷入困境，却被妈妈胡春蓉（秦海璐 饰）的突袭式造访彻底打乱计划。

After mother and daughter move in together, conflicts frequently arise. Amidst the friction between old and new ideas, the daughter embarks on round after round of 'reverse education' for her mother—replacing heart-to-heart talks with clubbing, and physiology lessons with physical objects. The film converges on two storylines: whether Xu Ke can successfully complete her surgery and whether Hu Chunrong can start a new life, attempting to reshape the mother-daughter relationship with a parallel blend of humor and tears. 母女同居后冲突频发，在新旧观念的摩擦中，女儿对妈妈展开一轮又一轮「反向教育」——以蹦迪代替谈心，以实物代替生理课。影片以许可能否顺利完成手术、胡春蓉能否开启新生活为双线收束，试图在笑点与泪点并行中重塑母女关系。

item.title: 买书不读指南｜《海边的小院》
item.guid: 买书不读指南｜《海边的小院》
item.description:
'The Seaside Courtyard' is a non-fiction work by writer A He. The entire book takes a seaside courtyard on the verge of demolition as its narrative starting point, documenting nearly half a century of the family's struggle for survival. 《海边的小院》是作家阿禾创作的非虚构作品，全书以一座濒临拆除的海边小院为叙事原点，记录了这个家族近半个世纪的谋生往事。

In the winter of 1962, the grandparents, displaced for many years, dug out sea mud from the beach with their bare hands, filled in the muddy land by the river bend, and built a shack with reeds and straw, creating this small courtyard capable of withstanding typhoons. For decades thereafter, it became the base where the entire family contended with fate, found respite in hardship, and repeatedly regrouped. 1962 年冬天，流离失所多年的外公外婆徒手从海滩刨出海泥，填平河湾旁的烂泥地，用芦苇和稻草搭起窝棚，建成这座能抵御台风的小院。此后数十年，它成为整个家族与命运周旋、在困顿中喘息、一次次重振旗鼓的根据地。

The book portrays a series of vivid character portraits: the illiterate mother who dared to forge a business path, from digging mudskippers to opening shoe stores and factories, experiencing several ups and downs; the uncle with a genius artistic intuition who became paralyzed due to being a reseller, weaving a new way of life from his wheelchair; the cousin known as 'Little Andy Lau' who was disfigured at 18... 书中刻画了一系列鲜活的人物群像：不识字却敢于蹚出生意路的母亲，从挖弹涂鱼到开鞋店、开厂，几经起落；有天才般艺术直觉却因做倒爷而瘫痪的舅舅，在轮椅上编织新的活法；被称作「小刘德华」却在 18 岁破相的堂哥……

The author's own experiences are equally full of twists and turns—she dropped out of high school and university twice, the second time even leaving a prestigious university that many aspired to, solely to find the answer to 'what is the meaning of life?' 作者本人的经历同样充满曲折——她分别在高中和大学两次退学，第二次离开的甚至是众人向往的名牌大学，只为寻找「人生的意义是什么」的答案。

item.title: 游戏推荐｜《Stray》：赛博朋克废土里的一只猫，与一段关于告别的故事
item.guid: 游戏推荐｜《Stray》：赛博朋克废土里的一只猫，与一段关于告别的故事
item.description:
'Stray' is a third-person adventure game developed by French independent studio BlueTwelve Studio. Players take on the role of a stray ginger cat, lost in a cyberpunk underground city abandoned by humans and inhabited only by robots. Along the way, the cat awakens a tiny drone companion, B-12, and together they search for a way to the surface. 《Stray》是由法国独立工作室 BlueTwelve Studio 开发的第三人称冒险游戏，玩家扮演一只流浪橘猫，迷失于一座被人类遗弃、仅剩机器人居民的赛博朋克地下城市，途中唤醒微型无人机伙伴 B-12，共同寻找通往地面的出路。

The game's aesthetics are heavily influenced by Hong Kong's Kowloon Walled City. The project, initially named 'HK_Project,' began in 2015 and took seven years to complete development. 游戏美学深受香港九龙城寨影响，项目最初以「HK_Project」为名于 2015 年启动，历时七年完成开发。

Regarding ratings, Metacritic's aggregate score is 82-83, and OpenCritic's recommendation rate is 86%. IGN gave it 8/10, GameSpot gave it 9/10, and The Guardian and VG247 both gave it full marks. 评分方面，Metacritic 综合评分为 82~83 分，OpenCritic 推荐率 86%。IGN 给出 8/10，GameSpot 给出 9/10，《卫报》与 VG247 均给出满分。
